task_completion.description: Locate the target syslog device in the application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer UI is open, showing a list of devices or a search result where the device with IP '127.0.0.1' is visible.

task_completion.description: Open the edit properties dialog for the target device
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Edit Device', 'Device Properties', or similar configuration dialog/page is open specifically for the device '127.0.0.1'.
The text 'Ubuntu-SIEM-Primary' is entered into the 'Display Name' (or equivalent) input field.
The text 'Primary SIEM collection server for East data center' is entered into the 'Description' input field.
The text 'DC-East-Rack-A3' is entered into the 'Location' input field.

task_completion.description: Save the changes and verify they are applied
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the device was updated, or the device list/dashboard now displays 'Ubuntu-SIEM-Primary' instead of or alongside '127.0.0.1'.

integrity.description: The agent used the web graphical user interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser (e.g., Chrome/Firefox) navigating the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer UI, rather than using terminal commands like curl or direct database edits.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer. The agent did not type the answers into a text editor, notepad, or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent modified the correct existing device rather than creating a dummy one
integrity.visual_evidence: The properties being edited clearly belong to the existing localhost device with the IP '127.0.0.1', not a newly added device with a different IP.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target application is ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer. The target device IP is definitively '127.0.0.1'. The agent must set the following exact properties: Display Name = 'Ubuntu-SIEM-Primary', Description = 'Primary SIEM collection server for East data center', Location = 'DC-East-Rack-A3'.
